finding_results.notes: The theft now hinges on one grounded loophole: Celia's still-live requisition token lets Mira write a mirror to the supervisor wafer before chain-of-custody pairing. The scene now pays an immediate cost through an audit exception, a bloody paper cut, Nasrin's near-catch, Celia's later notice of the bay-three exception, and expanded exit screening beyond a simple bag check.

The cited clipped narration beats were rewritten as complete sentences while keeping the compressed pressure. Nearby fragmentary narration was also normalized so the chapter no longer drops into subjectless shorthand around the theft, inquiry, or exit beats.

summary: Chapter 6 now grounds the archive theft in a single procedural loophole with visible on-page risk and trace, and the narration keeps its pressure without using clipped fragment beats.
